description: A high-priority VFX shot for a feature film fails to render on the automated render farm.

nodes.task_description: Identify the failed render job and retrieve its error log from the render queue manager.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the log, which shows a 'Missing Texture File' error.

nodes.task_description: Check the digital asset management system to verify the location of the missing texture file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the texture file was recently moved to a new directory.

nodes.task_description: Update the scene file with the correct file path for the texture.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the path in the scene file.

nodes.task_description: Resubmit the render job to the queue with a high priority.
